records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander...!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
No...! There's no way
8g!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
No...! There's no way
8g!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
No...! There's no way
8g!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Ouch!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Ouch!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Ouch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hngh, you were right, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hngh, you were right, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hngh, you were right, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I should've exercised regularly. I'm out of breath, and...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I should've exercised regularly. I'm out of breath, and...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I should've exercised regularly. I'm out of breath, and...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle*

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said... You said that you'd come back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said... You said that you'd come back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said... You said that you'd come back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* You promised me that you'd return after a successful mission.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* You promised me that you'd return after a successful mission.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* You promised me that you'd return after a successful mission.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...And I said that I'd wait for you here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...And I said that I'd wait for you here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...And I said that I'd wait for you here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sniffle* Commander...!! How could you...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sniffle* Commander...!! How could you...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sniffle* Commander...!! How could you...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are we supposed to do now...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are we supposed to do now...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are we supposed to do now...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sob* We've...! We've lost our Commander twice already...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sob* We've...! We've lost our Commander twice already...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sob* We've...! We've lost our Commander twice already...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Fenrir Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Fenrir Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Fenrir Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Headquarters, Operation Troubleshooting has been completed as of now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Headquarters, Operation Troubleshooting has been completed as of now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Headquarters, Operation Troubleshooting has been completed as of now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Multiple Elite Members, including Carmen, have been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Multiple Elite Members, including Carmen, have been neutralized.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Multiple Elite Members, including Carmen, have been neutralized.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maestra's core has been destroyed, and the divisions in the Normalside are tracking her as we speak.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maestra's core has been destroyed, and the divisions in the Normalside are tracking her as we speak.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maestra's core has been destroyed, and the divisions in the Normalside are tracking her as we speak.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once Philharmonic Hall's stasis field is lifted, we will also return to the Normalside with the injured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once Philharmonic Hall's stasis field is lifted, we will also return to the Normalside with the injured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once Philharmonic Hall's stasis field is lifted, we will also return to the Normalside with the injured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Commander Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Commander Alice Braidwood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Commander Alice Braidwood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I hope you rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I hope you rest in peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I hope you rest in peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you hear that, Commander?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you hear that, Commander?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you hear that, Commander?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your sacrifice... wasn't in vain...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your sacrifice... wasn't in vain...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your sacrifice... wasn't in vain...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a hero of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a hero of the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a hero of the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... will never forget you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... will never forget you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... will never forget you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The courage you showed me, I'll take it to heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The courage you showed me, I'll take it to heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The courage you showed me, I'll take it to heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And, one day, I'll become someone like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And, one day, I'll become someone like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And, one day, I'll become someone like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So...! You should always watch over me from there...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So...! You should always watch over me from there...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So...! You should always watch over me from there...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You have to promise me! Pinky promise!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You have to promise me! Pinky promise!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You have to promise me! Pinky promise!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Where am I
8v?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Where am I
8v?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Where am I
8v?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, so this is how it ends.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, so this is how it ends.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, so this is how it ends.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, oh well. At least I did my best, so I have no regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, oh well. At least I did my best, so I have no regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, oh well. At least I did my best, so I have no regrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Captain.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Captain.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Captain.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I guess I couldn't end up being an excellent firefighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I guess I couldn't end up being an excellent firefighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I guess I couldn't end up being an excellent firefighter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I was able to save the people I care about in the end.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I was able to save the people I care about in the end.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I was able to save the people I care about in the end.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm happy with that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm happy with that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm happy with that.
